# Request for Proposal (RFP)

---

| **Issue Date**        | [DD-MMM-YYYY]                              |

| 1.1 | [Date] | [Name] | [Amendment description] |

## Section 1 --- Invitation to Bid

[Organization Legal Name] ("Buyer") invites qualified vendors ("Respondents") to submit proposals for the provision of [brief project description]. This RFP establishes the requirements, evaluation criteria, and procurement timeline governing the competitive solicitation process.

**Procurement Method:** [ ] Open Tender [ ] Restricted Tender [ ] Request for Proposal

**Contract Type:** [ ] Fixed-Price [ ] Time-and-Materials [ ] Cost-Plus [ ] Hybrid

**Estimated Contract Value:** $[X] -- $[X] (range or ceiling)

**Funding Source:** [Budget line / cost center / grant number]

## Section 4 --- Procurement Timeline

| Milestone                   | Date             | Time        | Notes                                 |
| --------------------------- | ---------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------- |
| RFP Published               | [Date]           | --          | Distribution to qualified vendors     |
| Intent to Respond Due       | [Date]           | [Time] [TZ] | Written notice of participation       |
| Vendor Questions Due        | [Date]           | [Time] [TZ] | Submitted via [method]                |
| Buyer Responses Published   | [Date]           | --          | Addendum to all respondents           |
| Pre-Proposal Conference     | [Date]           | [Time] [TZ] | [Location / virtual link]             |
| Proposals Due               | [Date]           | [Time] [TZ] | Late submissions will not be accepted |
| Evaluation Period           | [Date] -- [Date] | --          | Internal review                       |
| Shortlist Notification      | [Date]           | --          | Top [X] respondents                   |
| Oral Presentations / Demos  | [Date] -- [Date] | [Time] [TZ] | [Duration] per vendor                 |
| Best and Final Offer (BAFO) | [Date]           | [Time] [TZ] | If applicable                         |
| Award Notification          | [Date]           | --          | Written notification                  |
| Contract Execution          | [Date]           | --          | Target start date                     |

---

## Section 5 --- Evaluation Criteria

### 5.1 Scoring Methodology

Proposals will be evaluated using a weighted scoring model. Each criterion is scored on a scale of 0-10 by an independent evaluation committee.

| Criterion                                      | Weight   | Maximum Points |
| ---------------------------------------------- | -------- | -------------- |
| Technical Approach and Solution Design         | [X]%     | [X]            |
| Organizational Experience and Past Performance | [X]%     | [X]            |
| Key Personnel and Team Qualifications          | [X]%     | [X]            |
| Implementation Plan and Timeline               | [X]%     | [X]            |
| Pricing and Total Cost of Ownership            | [X]%     | [X]            |
| References and Client Satisfaction             | [X]%     | [X]            |
| **Total**                                      | **100%** | **[X]**        |

### 5.2 Evaluation Process

1. **Compliance Screening** --- Pass/fail review of mandatory requirements
2. **Technical Evaluation** --- Independent scoring by evaluation panel
3. **Pricing Analysis** --- Normalized cost comparison
4. **Due Diligence** --- Reference checks, financial viability, site visits
5. **Consensus Scoring** --- Final weighted scores and ranking
6. **Award Recommendation** --- Committee recommendation to approving authority

---

## Section 6 --- Submission Requirements

### 6.1 Proposal Structure

Respondents shall organize proposals using the following sections:

| Volume | Section                                          | Page Limit |
| ------ | ------------------------------------------------ | ---------- |
| I      | Executive Summary                                | [X] pages  |
| II     | Company Profile and Qualifications               | [X] pages  |
| III    | Technical Approach                               | [X] pages  |
| IV     | Staffing Plan and Key Personnel                  | [X] pages  |
| V      | Implementation Timeline                          | [X] pages  |
| VI     | Pricing Proposal (separate sealed volume)        | No limit   |
| VII    | Appendices (certifications, references, samples) | No limit   |

### 6.2 Mandatory Enclosures

- [ ] Signed Cover Letter on company letterhead
- [ ] Completed Vendor Information Form (Appendix A)
- [ ] Audited financial statements (last [2-3] fiscal years)
- [ ] Proof of insurance (General Liability, Professional Liability, Cyber)
- [ ] Three (3) client references with contact information
- [ ] Certificate of incorporation / business license
- [ ] Signed Non-Disclosure Agreement (Appendix B)
- [ ] Completed Compliance Certification (Appendix C)
- [ ] Conflict of Interest Disclosure
- [ ] Subcontractor listing (if applicable)

### 6.3 Submission Instructions

- **Format:** [PDF / Electronic via portal / Hard copy]
- **Copies:** [X] electronic, [X] hard copies (if applicable)
- **Delivery Address:** [Full address or portal URL]
- **File Naming Convention:** `[VendorName]_RFP-[Number]_Volume[X].pdf`
- **Maximum File Size:** [X] MB per file

---

## Section 7 --- Terms and Conditions

### 7.1 General Provisions

1. **Contract Term:** Initial period of [X] months/years with [X] optional renewal periods of [X] months/years each.
2. **Payment Terms:** Net [30/45/60] from date of approved invoice.
3. **Liquidated Damages:** $[X] per day for delayed milestones, capped at [X]% of total contract value.
4. **Performance Bond:** [X]% of contract value required within [X] days of award.
5. **Insurance Minimums:** General Liability $[X]M, Professional Liability $[X]M, Cyber Liability $[X]M.

### 7.2 Confidentiality

All information contained in proposals and exchanged during the procurement process shall be treated as confidential. Respondents shall not disclose any aspect of this RFP or their proposal without prior written consent from the Buyer.

### 7.3 Reservation of Rights

The Buyer reserves the right to:

- Reject any or all proposals
- Waive minor informalities or irregularities
- Cancel this RFP at any time without liability
- Negotiate with one or more respondents
- Request clarifications or additional information
- Award to other than the lowest-priced proposal

### 7.4 Protests and Disputes

Respondents may submit written protests within [X] business days of award notification. Protests shall be directed to [Title/Office] and must include specific grounds and supporting documentation. The Buyer's decision on protests is final.

---

## Section 8 --- Communication Protocol

- All questions must be submitted in writing to: [email/portal]
- Verbal communications are not binding
- Responses to questions will be distributed to all respondents as addenda
- Respondents shall not contact evaluation committee members directly
- A single point of contact is designated: [Name, Title, Email]

---

## Section 9 --- Appendices

- **Appendix A:** Vendor Information Form
- **Appendix B:** Non-Disclosure Agreement
- **Appendix C:** Compliance Certification
- **Appendix D:** Pricing Worksheet
- **Appendix E:** Service Level Agreement Template
- **Appendix F:** Sample Contract Terms
